name: Ellie Greenwich
description: American pop music singer, songwriter, and record producer (1940-2009)
abstract: Eleanor Louise Greenwich (October 23, 1940 – August 26, 2009) was an American pop music singer, songwriter, and record producer. She wrote or co-wrote "Da Doo Ron Ron", "Be My Baby", "Maybe I Know", "Then He Kissed Me", "Do Wah Diddy Diddy", "Christmas (Baby Please Come Home)", "Hanky Panky", "Chapel of Love", "Leader of the Pack", and "…

works_created.t: (Today I Met) The Boy I'm Gonna Marry
